alt_text: A black and white hooded merganser swimming in rippling water, swallowing a long snake with its head tilted upward.
Several glossy black leeches cling to and feed on a mottled frog lying on the damp forest floor.
A dark seal head emerges from the water, holding a hot dog in its mouth.
A dark leech attached to and feeding on the side of a small, yellowish-pink fish.
A metallic green beetle with red legs and long antennae feeds on small yellow flowers among green leaves.
A reddish-brown beetle with cream-colored markings feeds on yellow flower clusters on a leafy green branch.
A black butterfly with bright blue bands perched on a leafy stem feeds on a cluster of small, yellow-green flowers.
A small, greyish-brown butterfly perched on a delicate white flower feeds on its nectar.
A brown spider on a yellow daisy-like flower grips a captured plume moth.
A brown skipper butterfly perched on a yellow daisy, feeding on nectar from its center.
A large, shiny black horsefly perched on tan fabric, biting through the clothing to feed on human blood.
A brown and white cottony cushion scale insect clings to and feeds on a fuzzy green plant stem.
A shiny black beetle with white spots clings to a slender green stem, feeding on a small white flower.
A fuzzy red and black moth perched on a green stem feeds on tiny, star-shaped white flowers.
A horsefly with large, iridescent green eyes bites into hairy human skin to feed.
A striped-eyed hoverfly perched on a blue daisy feeds on nectar from its yellow center.
An orange and brown jumping spider perched on green leaves, feeding on a captured fly.
A small brown skipper butterfly perched on a cluster of orange flowers, feeding on their nectar.
A cluster of small, striped caterpillars feeding on the stem and leaves of a green nettle plant.
A shiny black wasp with a long ovipositor feeds on a tiny, pale insect against a textured yellowish-green background.
A vibrant blue moth with orange markings feeds on small pink and yellow flowers.
